name: triage.open
_note: Promotes a detected threat into a per-user triage case persisted in globalThis._concordSTATE.sentinelCases keyed by ctx.actor.userId. STATE-backed — the assassin's internal owner actor writes a fresh case row (NEVER no_db). Missing threatId fails-closed. Idempotent on threatId: a re-open of the same threat returns created:false with the existing case; an unrecognised severity normalises to 'unknown'.
